cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Ahmed Khan, ji? This is King George's Medical University Lucknow, insurance desk. How are you, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm good, thanks. Just getting ready for discharge. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, great to hear that, sir. We need to guide you through the cashless claim process with your insurance provider. Can you please confirm your policy number?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Uh, yeah... it's... um... let me check... (pause) Ah, yes, it's... (reads out policy number)

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, thank you, Mr. Khan. Now, I just need you to sign a few forms. We have the pre-authorization form and the claim settlement form.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds fine. What do I need to do with them?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 66s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from the insurance desk at [HOSPITAL_NAME] calls a patient who is about to be discharged, guiding them on the documents and forms they need to sign for the cashless claim process with their insurance provider.
